summary: This skill enables computation of angular power spectra from Cosmic Microwave Background (CMB) temperature maps using spherical harmonic decomposition.
strategy: **Load and validate CMB temperature map** from NumPy array file, ensuring proper HEALPix format and μK units
**Determine map parameters** including NSIDE resolution and maximum multipole ℓ_max based on pixel count
**Perform spherical harmonic decomposition** to extract a_ℓm coefficients using simplified discrete transform
pitfalls: Incorrect HEALPix pixel ordering: Always verify RING vs NESTED pixel schemes affect spherical harmonic transforms
Units confusion: Ensure temperature data is in μK and power spectrum output is in μK² units throughout
Multipole range errors: ℓ_max must not exceed √(N_pixels/12) to avoid aliasing in the spherical harmonic transform
